commands.summary: No Web GAS, Spreadsheet, or Drive dependency found.
Only existing environment variable names and test dummy values were found; no real secret literal was added.
Existing photos bucket remains private, own-path policies are present, ingredient_scan metadata is used, and no public URL helper is called.

notes: No Supabase migration was added because the photos table, private photos bucket, and Storage RLS already exist from TKT-0103.
The implementation stores only the compressed image in Storage and does not call AI APIs.
